title: AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Technical Support II Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, Diploma, and DMLT can apply for the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
